name: Check Cashing Store
description_short: The Check Cashing Store offers check cashing, payday loans ($100-$1,000), money orders, and MoneyGram services across Florida with over 30 years of operating history.
description_long:
The Check Cashing Store is an established financial services provider that has operated across Florida for over 30 years, with a physical location at 7275 NW 36th Street in Miami, FL 33166. The company is part of Dollar Financial Group, Inc., which operates multiple check-cashing and financial services brands across North America.

The store offers a comprehensive range of financial services beyond basic check cashing. Their primary offerings include check cashing (including mobile check cashing via app), payday loans ranging from $100 to $1,000 with terms of 7 to 90 days available both online and in-store, MoneyGram money transfer services, money orders, small business financial services, and Momentum prepaid Mastercard products. The payday loans are explicitly noted as short-term solutions and require prior credit approval.

The Check Cashing Store distinguishes itself through its extended operating history (30+ years), multiple service channels (physical store, online, and mobile app), flexible loan terms (7-90 days), and diverse service offerings beyond basic check cashing. The store maintains consistent hours Monday-Saturday (10 AM-7 PM weekdays, 9 AM-5 PM Saturday) and provides local customer service through a direct phone line (305-599-2367). Their prepaid card product is issued by The Bancorp Bank and distributed by InComm Financial Services, adding institutional credibility.

This is a straightforward check-cashing and short-term lending storefront. Consumers should note that payday loans, while available for flexible terms, are explicitly positioned as short-term financial solutions rather than long-term borrowing options. Standard fees apply and vary by state, with item fees charged per transaction. The company operates under appropriate licensing (MoneyGram NMLS #898432) and carries standard financial services compliance disclaimers regarding credit approval and state-specific regulations.
pros: 30+ years of operating history in Florida, establishing long-term business stability
Flexible payday loan terms from 7 to 90 days (not just standard 2-week terms)
Multiple access channels: in-store, online, and mobile app check cashing
Broad service range including check cashing, loans, MoneyGram, money orders, prepaid cards, and small business services
Extended hours: open Monday-Saturday with evening hours (until 7 PM weekdays, 5 PM Saturday)
Prepaid Mastercard issued by FDIC-member The Bancorp Bank, adding institutional backing
Established local presence with direct phone support (305-599-2367)
cons: Payday loan limits capped at $1,000, insufficient for larger financial needs
Standard check-cashing fees apply with item fees that vary by state and specific transaction type
Payday loans require credit approval, excluding applicants with poor credit history
Company documentation explicitly warns that short-term loans become expensive if used beyond 2-4 weeks, yet terms extend to 90 days
Limited to single physical location in Miami for in-person services despite Florida-wide operations
best_for: Consumers needing immediate check cashing with same-day access in the Miami area
Short-term borrowers seeking payday loans with flexible repayment periods (7-90 days) rather than standard 2-week terms
Small business owners requiring check cashing, money orders, or basic financial services
International money transfer users sending funds via MoneyGram
diagnosis: The Check Cashing Store is best for consumers in the Miami area who need quick check cashing, small short-term loans ($100-$1,000), or money transfer services. The primary caveat is that payday loans, while available in flexible 7-90 day terms, are explicitly positioned as short-term solutions only—the company's own disclosures warn that using these loans beyond 2-4 weeks becomes expensive, yet loan terms extend to 90 days, potentially encouraging longer-term debt cycles.
services: Check cashing (in-store and mobile via app)
Payday loans ($100-$1,000, 7-90 day terms, online and in-store)
Momentum prepaid Mastercard (issued by The Bancorp Bank)
Currency exchange (via MoneyGram, with applicable exchange rates)
